info.description: Production-ready backend API for Kynettic platform with authentication, user management, and health monitoring
info.title: Kynettic API

post.description: Admin-only: add or update a community link (upsert by platform).
Admin-only: create or update a currency (upsert by symbol).

get.description: Admin-only: paginated crypto deposits, filterable by status and currency.

parameters.description: Filter by currency symbol e.g. USDT
parameters.name: currency

get.description: Admin-only: paginated crypto withdrawals, filterable by status and currency.

parameters.description: Filter by status: processing, completed, failed
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by currency symbol e.g. USDT
parameters.name: currency

get.description: Admin-only: paginated fiat deposits, filterable by status.
Admin-only: paginated fiat withdrawals, filterable by status.

parameters.description: Filter by status: processing, completed, failed
parameters.name: status

get.description: Admin-only: paginated internal transfers between users.
Admin-only: fetches the current ledger and available balance from the Nomba business account.
Admin-only: fetches all Quidax master-account wallets and returns only those with a non-zero balance.
Admin-only: total wallet balances per currency and pending deposit/withdrawal counts.
Admin-only: compares wallets.balance against SUM(balance_after - balance_before) from wallet_transactions. Returns only wallets with discrepancies. This is an expensive query — use sparingly.

parameters.description: Filter by currency symbol e.g. USDT (default: all currencies)
parameters.name: currency

get.description: Admin-only: paginated KYC queue with optional filters by status and tier.

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, verified, rejected
parameters.name: status

get.description: Admin-only: full KYC record for a user including address, selfie confidence, liveness score.

post.description: Admin-only: create or update a network (upsert by chain_key + network_type).
Create a notification for every user in the system (admin only)

get.description: Admin-only: paginated list of all P2P orders, filterable by status, currency, user, and date range.

parameters.description: Order status: pending, paid, disputed, cancelled, completed
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter orders where user is buyer or seller (UUID)
parameters.name: user_id

get.description: Admin-only: paginated list of users ranked by number of completed P2P trades, with total volume.
Admin endpoint to list all referral claim cycles.

post.description: Admin endpoint to open a claim cycle for a quarter with a fiat reward pool.

patch.description: Admin endpoint to close a claim cycle.

get.description: Admin endpoint to list all referral configuration values.

put.description: Admin endpoint to update a referral configuration value.

get.description: Admin endpoint to list all referral relationships, optionally filtered by status.
Admin endpoint to list all referrals made by a specific user.
Admin-only: fee totals grouped by day and currency. Default last 30 days.
Admin-only: lifetime fee balances per currency and order stats for the given date range (default last 30 days).
Admin-only: paginated user list with optional filters.
Admin-only: full user profile, security state, KYC, wallets, recent transactions.

patch.description: Admin-only: activate or deactivate a user. Deactivating immediately invalidates all sessions.

get.description: Admin-only: returns tier limit, custom override, today's usage, and remaining headroom.

post.description: Admin-only: permanently sets a custom daily NGN withdrawal limit for a user, overriding their tier default.

delete.description: Admin-only: removes the custom daily withdrawal limit for a user, reverting to their KYC tier default.

post.description: Authenticate user with email, password, and TOTP code

401.description: invalid email or password | account is deactivated | too many failed login attempts; please try again later | 2FA not configured for this account | 2FA not enabled for this account | invalid authenticator code

post.description: Exchange a pre_auth_token (from POST /auth/login) and a TOTP code for access and refresh tokens.

401.description: invalid or expired pre-auth token | invalid authenticator code

post.description: Authenticate or register a user using an Apple ID token and return access/refresh tokens.

401.description: invalid Apple ID token | account is deactivated

post.description: Send a 6-digit OTP to email (valid for 10 minutes). Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: If this email is registered, an OTP has been sent

post.description: Resend the 6-digit password reset OTP. Subject to the same rate limits as the initial request (60s minimum between sends, max 3 per 10-minute window). Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: If this email is registered, an OTP has been resent

post.description: Reset password after OTP verification.

400.description: invalid or expired reset token | password must be at least 12 characters long and include upper, lower, number, and symbol | user not found | account is deactivated

post.description: Verify OTP and return a short-lived reset token used to set a new password.

400.description: otp not found or expired | too many invalid otp attempts | invalid otp

post.description: Authenticate or register a user using a Google ID token and return access/refresh tokens.

401.description: invalid Google ID token | account is deactivated

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password. Returns full tokens when 2FA is disabled. Returns 202 with a short-lived pre_auth_token when 2FA is enabled — exchange it via POST /auth/2fa/verify.

401.description: invalid email or password | account is deactivated | too many failed login attempts

post.description: Invalidate the current session. The user's session on the other device type (if any) is not affected.
Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token
Send a 6-digit OTP to email (valid for 10 minutes). User is created only after OTP verification + password set. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: If this email is eligible for registration, an OTP has been sent

post.description: Resend the 6-digit registration OTP. Subject to the same rate limits as the initial request (60s minimum between sends, max 3 per 10-minute window). Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: If this email is eligible for registration, an OTP has been resent

post.description: Create user after OTP verification by setting password (names are collected later).

400.description: invalid or expired registration token | password must be at least 12 characters long and include upper, lower, number, and symbol | user with this email already exists

post.description: Verify OTP and return a short-lived registration token used to set password.

400.description: otp not found or expired | too many invalid otp attempts | invalid otp

get.description: Returns all community links. Requires authentication.
Public: list configured currencies.
Public: list active blockchain networks that support a specific currency.
get.summary: List supported networks for a currency

get.description:
Public: get the current market price of a cryptocurrency in Nigerian Naira (NGN) from CoinGecko.
Public: returns the fee tiers for fiat withdrawals and per-network fees for crypto withdrawals.

404.description: Currency not found or CoinGecko ID not configured

get.description: Check the health status of the API and its dependencies (database, Redis)
Public: list active networks.

Retrieve a paginated list of P2P ads with computed effective prices, optionally filtered by type and currency. When mine_only=true, only the authenticated user's ads are returned. For relative pricing ads, effective_price is calculated based on current market price.

parameters.description: If true, only return my ads
parameters.name: mine_only

post.description: Create a new P2P ad (buy or sell) with pricing mode, rollover, limits, and privacy options.

delete.description: Delete a P2P ad you own.

patch.description: Update mutable fields of a P2P ad you own (price, limits, privacy, status).

get.description: Returns the platform fee percentage charged per P2P trade.
Retrieve a paginated list of P2P ads created by the authenticated user, optionally filtered by type, currency, and status.
Retrieve a paginated list of P2P orders where the authenticated user is buyer or seller.

post.description: Execute an automated P2P trade (buy or sell) using an existing ad; funds are moved between on-platform fiat and crypto wallets.

get.description: Get a paginated list of all reviews

post.description: Submit a review with name, email and content

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users (admin only)
Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Update the authenticated user's name or email

400.description: Invalid request or email already exists

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated personal data in compliance with Google Play Store data deletion policy. A confirmation email is sent before deletion. Financial records (transactions, orders, wallet history) are retained for up to 7 years to satisfy anti-money-laundering and financial regulations. All active sessions are immediately revoked.

post.description: Disable Google Authenticator for the authenticated user. Requires both transaction PIN and a valid TOTP code.

400.description: invalid PIN | invalid authenticator code | 2FA not enabled

post.description: Verify a 6-digit TOTP code and enable Google Authenticator for the authenticated user.
Generate a TOTP secret and otpauth URL for the authenticated user.
Change the authenticated user's password

400.description: Invalid old password or validation error

post.description: Initiate an on-chain crypto withdrawal via Quidax, protected by a 6-digit PIN and 6-digit authenticator (TOTP) code.

get.description: Return the user's deposit bank account; if missing, create via Nomba and persist.

post.description: Verify the OTP sent to the new email address and update the account email.
Send a 6-digit OTP to the new email address. Call /me/email-change/confirm with the code to commit the change.

200.description: OTP sent to new email address

400.description: Validation error or email already in use

post.description: Resolve the account name for a bank account using Nomba's bank lookup.

get.description: Retrieve banks and their codes for fiat withdrawals via Nomba.

post.description: Initiate a fiat withdrawal to a bank account via Nomba, protected by a 6-digit PIN and 6-digit authenticator (TOTP) code.
Transfer funds between users by receiver UID or email. Currency is provided by currency_id (from reference currencies). Protected by a 6-digit PIN and 6-digit authenticator (TOTP) code.

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's KYC verification status and tier

post.description: Submit user details and BVN for Tier 1 verification
Submit NIN for Tier 2 verification
Submit NIN, selfie image file, utility bill file, and address for Tier 3 verification. Files are uploaded to Cloudinary.

get.description: List notifications for the authenticated user

patch.description: Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user
Mark a specific notification as read for the authenticated user

post.description: Change the 6-digit transaction PIN used together with Google Authenticator for high-risk actions.

400.description: Validation error or invalid old PIN

post.description: Configure a 6-digit transaction PIN used together with Google Authenticator for high-risk actions.

400.description: Validation error or PIN already configured

get.description: Returns referral code, total referrals, points, and quarterly eligibility status.

post.description: Claims fiat reward for the currently open claim cycle.

get.description: Returns paginated claim history.
Returns top referrers ranked by points earned in the current quarter.
Returns paginated point accrual history.
Returns paginated list of referred users.
Return the user's wallet address for a given chain on mainnet; if missing, create via Quidax and persist.
List enriched wallet transactions for the authenticated user, optionally filtered by currency
List all wallets (balances per currency) for the authenticated user
Retrieve a specific user's information by ID (admin only)

delete.description: Delete a user by ID (admin only)

400.description: Invalid user ID or cannot delete user

get.description:
Public: get the current market price of a cryptocurrency in Nigerian Naira (NGN) from CoinGecko.
Public: returns the fee tiers for fiat withdrawals and per-network fees for crypto withdrawals.

404.description: Currency not found or CoinGecko ID not configured

get.description: Public: returns the withdrawal fee for a specific currency and chain, sourced from Quidax and cached for 5 hours.

new_password.description: Enforce strong password policy consistent with registration and reset flows.

asset_id.description: Optional Blockradar asset ID for crypto withdrawals (UUID-like).

coingecko_id.description: Optional CoinGecko coin ID for price fetching (e.g., "tether", "ethereum").

auth_code.description: 6-digit Google Authenticator (TOTP) code. Required only when 2FA is enabled.

amount_input.description: The amount the user wants to trade, expressed in input_currency.

input_currency.description: "fiat" or "crypto" — which side amount_input is denominated in.

auth_code.description: 6-digit Google Authenticator (TOTP) code. Required only when 2FA is enabled.
6-digit Google Authenticator (TOTP) code. Required only when 2FA is enabled.

effective_price.description:
EffectivePrice is the current effective price for this ad.
For fixed pricing, this is the same as Price.
For relative pricing, this is the current market price adjusted by RelativePercent.

total_quantity.description: total ad capacity when rollover is off

fee_amount.description:
FeeAmount and FeeCurrency are the taker fee for this order — the fee
charged to the party who created the order (executed against the ad).

order_number.description: OrderNumber is a public-facing 20-digit numeric identifier for the order.

side.description:
Side is from the perspective of the authenticated user: "buy" if the
user bought crypto in this order, "sell" if they sold crypto.

type.description: Type indicates whether this is a buy or sell order for crypto (mirrors the ad type).

asset_id.description:
AssetID is the Blockradar asset identifier used for withdrawals (UUID-like string).
It is optional because not all currencies need to be withdrawable via Blockradar.

coingecko_id.description:
CoinGeckoID is the CoinGecko coin identifier used for price fetching (e.g., "tether", "ethereum").
It is optional and only needed for currencies that support relative pricing in P2P ads.

type.description:
Type distinguishes fiat currencies (NGN, USD, etc.) from crypto assets.
Values: "fiat" or "crypto". Defaults to "crypto" for backward compatibility.
Existing fiat currency rows must be updated via a DB migration after deployment.

total_quantity.description: total ad capacity when rollover is off

receipt.description:
Receipt holds type-specific details (bank info for fiat, chain info for
crypto). It is always present so the client can access receipt fields
without checking a separate level.

currency.description:
Currency is not stored in this table; it is populated from the parent
wallet at query time via a JOIN.

order_number.description: OrderNumber is a public-facing 20-digit numeric identifier for the order.

type.description: Type indicates whether this is a buy or sell order for crypto (mirrors the ad type).

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
